---
title: Excalidraw Component Test
description: Testing the Excalidraw MDC component integration
date: 2026-03-04
---

This article tests the Excalidraw MDC component integration.

## Test Diagram

Below is a test diagram loaded from a `.excalidraw` file:

::Excalidraw{src="assets/test-diagram.excalidraw"}

## Features to Verify

1. **Read-only mode**: The diagram should not show editing toolbar
2. **Zoom**: Use mouse wheel to zoom in/out
3. **Pan**: Click and drag to pan around the diagram
4. **Dark mode**: Toggle dark mode to see theme adaptation
5. **Error handling**: Missing file should show error message

## Error Test

This should show an error (file doesn't exist):

::Excalidraw{src="assets/nonexistent.excalidraw"}
